VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Origin Jumpworks
Focus: Racing

How do you make fast go faster? Origin Jumpworks' X1 Velocity dares to push the boundaries of speed by stripping down the base X1 to its core elements; eliminating the weapon mount and incorporating new Syntek composites to create a lighter chassis for overall weight loss.
